title: 有馬記念の後に・“帝王”君臨

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a roar from the crowd, Tokai Teio wins the
Arima Kinen. However, it takes a while for reality
to set in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf praises her and proclaims that she
will one day take back the throne that was stolen
from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words finally make Tokai Teio realize that
she's surpassed the Emperor at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Symboli Rudolf's prodding, Tokai Teio heads
off to stand in front of the crowd and proclaim
the birth of a new Monarch.
